summary: The primary automation workflow must monitor one print with one command, expose distinct embedded project/profile/object identities consistently through start and terminal events, and retain preview assets.
reason: Requiring callers to construct timestamped directories, background a watcher, capture process IDs, and assemble post-run files leaks implementation plumbing into the core agent and notification use case.
validated_outcome: The live printer-side 3MF exposes embedded title Benchy Bambu Pla Basic, profile title 14min44s Bambu PLA Basic A1, and object 3DBenchy.stl; matching terminal events reuse the enriched identity while the unavailable local Studio window filename is documented honestly.
